content: أحمَد طَبَعَ خَمسين نُسخةً مِنَ المَلَفِّ دَه بِالْغَلَطِ
translations: eng:Ahmed printed fifty copies of that file by mistake

transcriptions.arabizi: 'ahmad tabaA chamseen nuscha min ilmalaffadah biilghalat
